member.name: T:AgentSDK.CommandResult
member.summary: Result codes returned by IAgentActions command methods. Agents can inspect these to understand why a command failed and avoid re-issuing the same failing command every frame.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.SUCCESS
member.summary: Command was accepted and dispatched to the unit.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.UNIT_NOT_FOUND
member.summary: The specified unit does not exist.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.UNIT_CANNOT_PERFORM_ACTION
member.summary: The unit does not have the capability for this command (e.g., a warrior trying to build).

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.INVALID_POSITION
member.summary: The target position is outside the map boundaries.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.POSITION_NOT_WALKABLE
member.summary: The target position is not walkable (blocked by terrain).

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.AREA_NOT_BUILDABLE
member.summary: The build area is occupied or otherwise not buildable.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.MISSING_DEPENDENCY
member.summary: A required dependency building has not been built yet.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.INSUFFICIENT_GOLD
member.summary: Not enough gold to perform the action.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.TARGET_NOT_FOUND
member.summary: The target unit does not exist.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.INVALID_TARGET
member.summary: The target unit type is invalid for this command (e.g., attacking a mine, gathering from a non-mine).

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.FRIENDLY_FIRE
member.summary: Cannot attack or interact with your own units in this way.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.UNIT_BUSY
member.summary: The unit is busy with another action and cannot accept this command.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.BUILDING_NOT_FINISHED
member.summary: The building has not finished construction yet.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.NO_PATH_FOUND
member.summary: No path could be found to the target.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.ON_COOLDOWN
member.summary: The command was throttled because the same unit recently failed a similar command. Try again after a short delay.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.CommandResult.INSUFFICIENT_MANA
member.summary: The unit does not have enough mana to perform this action.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.CommandType
member.summary: Types of commands that agents can issue to units.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.CommandValidator
member.summary: Shared command validation rules. Both the Unity game engine and SimGame call these to ensure identical acceptance/rejection of agent commands.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.CommandValidator.ValidateMove(AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Validate a Move command.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.CommandValidator.ValidateBuild(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{AgentSDK.UnitType})
member.summary: Validate a Build command.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.CommandValidator.ValidateGather(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validate a Gather command.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.CommandValidator.ValidateTrain(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Boolean,AgentSDK.UnitAction,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validate a Train command.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.CommandValidator.ValidateAttack(AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Int32,System.Int32,AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Validate an Attack command.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.CommandValidator.ValidateRepair(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validate a Repair command.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.CommandValidator.ValidateHeal(AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Single,AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validate a Heal command.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants
member.summary: Game-speed-dependent constants computed from base values. Both the Unity engine and the SimGame test harness use this single implementation so derived values are guaranteed identical at any game speed.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.BASE_MOVE_SPEED
member.summary: Base move speed factor: pawn speed = gameSpeed * BASE_MOVE_SPEED.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.SPEED_MULTIPLIER
member.summary: Speed multipliers relative to pawn (1.0). Matches both Unity and SimGame.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.UNIT_VALUE
member.summary: Unit scoring for timeout win condition: ceil(COST / SCORING_SCALAR).

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.ScalarCreationTime
member.summary: Creation time scalar: 1 / gameSpeed.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.ScalarDamage
member.summary: Damage scalar: gameSpeed.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.ScalarMovingSpeed
member.summary: Base moving speed (pawn): gameSpeed * BASE_MOVE_SPEED.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.ScalarMiningSpeed
member.summary: Mining speed scalar: gameSpeed.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.ManaRegen
member.summary: Mana regen per second (scaled by game speed).

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.MiningSpeed
member.summary: Gold per second for PAWN mining.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.MiningCapacity
member.summary: Gold per trip for PAWN.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.CreationTime
member.summary: Time to create each unit in seconds at current game speed.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.Damage
member.summary: Damage per second for each unit at current game speed.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.MovingSpeed
member.summary: Movement speed (cells/tick) for each unit at current game speed.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.MiningSpeedPerUnit
member.summary: Mining speed for each unit type.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.MiningCapacityPerUnit
member.summary: Mining capacity for each unit type.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.Cost
member.summary: Cost for each unit type (direct copy from GameConstants).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.DerivedGameConstants.Compute(System.Int32)
member.summary: Compute all game-speed-dependent constants for the given game speed.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.FailedCommand
member.summary: A command that passed queue-time validation but failed during Phase 1 processing. Returned by .

member.name: F:AgentSDK.FailedCommand.UnitNbr
member.summary: The unit that was issued the command.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.FailedCommand.Type
member.summary: The type of command that failed.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.FailedCommand.Reason
member.summary: The reason the command failed.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.GameConstants
member.summary: Game balance constants. These are the authoritative values used by the game engine.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.SCALAR_COST
member.summary: Base cost scalar (all costs are multiples of this)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.SCALAR_MINING_CAPACITY
member.summary: Base mining capacity scalar

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.SCORING_SCALAR
member.summary: Scoring divisor: UNIT_VALUE = ceil(COST / SCORING_SCALAR)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.COST
member.summary: Cost to build or train each unit type. Check your Gold against these before issuing Build/Train commands.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.HEALTH
F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.MINING_CAPACITY
member.summary: How much gold a pawn can carry per mining trip

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.BASE_DAMAGE
member.summary: Base damage per game-speed unit (multiply by game speed to get actual DPS).

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.CREATION_TIME_MULTIPLIER
member.summary: Creation time multipliers (divide by game speed to get duration in seconds).

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.ATTACK_RANGE
member.summary: Attack range for each unit type (in grid units)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.UNIT_SIZE
member.summary: Size of each unit on the grid (width, height)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.DEPENDENCY
member.summary: Prerequisites required before building/training each unit type

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.BUILDS
member.summary: What structures each unit type can build

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.TRAINS
member.summary: What unit types each structure can train

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.CAN_MOVE
member.summary: Which unit types can move

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.CAN_BUILD
member.summary: Which unit types can build structures

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.CAN_TRAIN
member.summary: Which unit types can train units

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.CAN_ATTACK
member.summary: Which unit types can attack

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.CAN_GATHER
member.summary: Which unit types can gather resources

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.CAN_HEAL
member.summary: Which unit types can heal allied units

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.HEAL_RANGE
member.summary: Heal range for each unit type (in grid units)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.MAX_MANA
member.summary: Maximum mana pool for each unit type

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.MANA_COST
member.summary: Mana cost per heal action (10% of max mana)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.BASE_MANA_REGEN
member.summary: Base mana regeneration rate (scaled by game speed)
Base mana regeneration rate (scaled by game speed). Full pool (100) in ~3s at speed 20.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameConstants.HEAL_AMOUNT
member.summary: Flat HP restored per heal action

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameConstants.EffectiveAttackRange(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Compute effective attack range against a target, accounting for target unit size. Effective range = base attack range + max(target width, target height) / 2.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameConstants.DamageMultiplier(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Damage multiplier based on attacker/defender type interaction. Rock-paper-scissors triangle: Warrior→Archer→Lancer→Warrior. Strong matchup = 1.25x damage, weak matchup = 0.75x damage.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameConstants.ValidateDictionaries
member.summary: Validate that every UnitType-keyed dictionary covers all enum values. Returns a list of error messages (empty if all dictionaries are complete). Call at game startup or in tests to catch missing entries early.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.CellState
member.summary: Cell access level for the grid. Each cell is in exactly one state. OPEN — empty, can walk/build/stand WALKABLE — can walk through but not build or stand (unit occupying, or building top row) BLOCKED — terrain or building body, impassable

member.name: T:AgentSDK.GameGrid
member.summary:
Pure-C# grid for an RTS map. Each cell has a single CellState.
Both the Unity game engine and the AgentTestHarness SimGame share this single implementation so grid state and queries are guaranteed identical.
Coordinate system: (0,0) bottom-left; +X right, +Y up. Building footprints extend from anchor (x,y) rightward and downward: cells = (x+i, y-j) for i in [0..sizeX), j in [0..sizeY).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.GetCell(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Get the state of a cell. Out-of-bounds returns BLOCKED.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.GetCell(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the state of a cell. Out-of-bounds returns BLOCKED.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsPositionBuildable(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Can a building be placed on this cell? Only OPEN cells.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsPositionWalkable(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Can a unit path through this cell? OPEN or WALKABLE cells.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsPositionStandable(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Can a unit stop on this cell? Only OPEN cells.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsPositionPassage(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Is this a WALKABLE cell? (building passage or unit-occupied).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsPassageCell(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Is this specifically a building passage cell (top row)?

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsAreaBuildable(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if the full footprint for a unit type is buildable at the given anchor.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsAreaBuildable(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if the full footprint is buildable, excluding one position (e.g., the building pawn's cell which it will vacate).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsBoundedAreaBuildable(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if the unit footprint plus a 1-cell border is all buildable.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.SetCell(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.CellState)
member.summary: Set a single cell's state.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.SetCell(System.Int32,System.Int32,AgentSDK.CellState)
member.summary: Set a single cell's state.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.SetCellBlocked(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Mark a single cell as BLOCKED (terrain wall).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.SetCellBlocked(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Mark a single cell as BLOCKED (terrain wall).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.SetUnitFootprint(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Update grid state for a unit's footprint. When placing (occupy=true): building body→BLOCKED, building top row→WALKABLE, mobile unit→WALKABLE. When removing (occupy=false): all cells→OPEN.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.GetPositionsNearUnit(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Get all grid positions in the ring around a unit's footprint.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.GetBuildablePositionsNearUnit(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Get OPEN positions near a unit where a mobile unit can stand. Used for spawn positions, pathfinding targets, and adjacency checks. Only returns cells in the neighbor ring (not passage cells inside the footprint).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.IsNeighborOfUnit(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if a position is adjacent to a unit (in the neighbor ring or on a passage cell of the building's top row).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.FindProspectiveBuildPositions(AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Find all valid build positions on the map for a given unit type.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.FindPath(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Find shortest path using walkable grid (OPEN or WALKABLE cells). Returns empty list if no path exists. Excludes start, includes end.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.FindPath(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Find shortest path. When avoidUnits=true, only uses OPEN cells (treats WALKABLE cells as impassable to avoid mobile units).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.FindPathToUnit(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Find a path from start to any walkable cell adjacent to the given unit. Neighbors are sorted by distance to the start position so the closest reachable cell is tried first. Returns the first successful path.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.SetAreaBuildability(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Alias for SetUnitFootprint. Matches old API used by callers.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.GameGrid.CellDebugLog
member.summary: Mark a mobile unit as occupying (occupy=true) or leaving (occupy=false) a cell. On leave, restores to WALKABLE if the cell is a building passage, otherwise OPEN.
Optional debug callback for cell state changes.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.GameGrid.SetCellStandable(AgentSDK.Position,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Legacy alias for SetCellOccupied.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.IAgentActions
member.summary: Interface for issuing commands to your units. All commands are validated by the game engine. Each method returns a indicating success or the specific reason for failure.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Move(System.Int32,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Move a unit to a target grid position. The unit must be able to move and the target must be walkable.
member.param: The grid position to move to
member.returns: Success if the command was dispatched, or a failure code.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Build(System.Int32,AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Send a pawn to build a structure at a target position. Requires sufficient gold and all dependencies met.
member.param: The pawn unit that will build
Type of structure to build (BASE, BARRACKS, ARCHERY, or TOWER)
member.returns: Success if the command was dispatched, or a failure code.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Gather(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Send a pawn to gather gold from a mine and return it to a base.
member.param: The gold mine to gather from
The base to return gold to
member.returns: Success if the command was dispatched, or a failure code.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Train(System.Int32,AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Train a new unit at a structure. Requires sufficient gold and the structure must be fully built.
member.param: The structure that will train (BASE, BARRACKS, ARCHERY, or TOWER)
Type of unit to train (PAWN, WARRIOR, ARCHER, or LANCER)
member.returns: Success if the command was dispatched, or a failure code.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Attack(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Command a combat unit to attack an enemy unit. Cannot attack your own units or mines.
member.returns: Success if the command was dispatched, or a failure code.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Repair(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Send a pawn to repair a damaged friendly building. The building must belong to the same agent and have less than full health.
member.param: The pawn unit that will repair
member.returns: Success if the command was dispatched, or a failure code.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Heal(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Command a monk to heal a friendly unit. The target must be a friendly mobile unit at or below 80% health. The monk must have sufficient mana.
member.returns: Success if the command was dispatched, or a failure code.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IAgentActions.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Log a message to your agent's CSV output file. Useful for debugging and learning data.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.IGameState
member.summary: Read-only view of the current game state. Passed to your agent each frame so you can make decisions.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.IGameState.MyAgentNbr
member.summary: Your agent's unique number

member.name: P:AgentSDK.IGameState.EnemyAgentNbr
member.summary: The enemy agent's unique number

member.name: P:AgentSDK.IGameState.MyGold
member.summary: Your current gold

member.name: P:AgentSDK.IGameState.EnemyGold
member.summary: The enemy's current gold

member.name: P:AgentSDK.IGameState.MapSize
member.summary: Size of the map grid

member.name: P:AgentSDK.IGameState.MyWins
member.summary: Your agent's win count

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetMyUnits(AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Get all of your units of a specific type. Returns a list of unit numbers (IDs).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetEnemyUnits(AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Get all enemy units of a specific type. Returns a list of unit numbers (IDs).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetAllUnits(AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Get all units of a specific type regardless of owner (e.g., mines). Returns a list of unit numbers (IDs).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetUnit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get detailed info about a specific unit by its number. Returns null if the unit doesn't exist.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.IsPositionBuildable(AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Is a specific grid position walkable/buildable?

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.IsAreaBuildable(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Can a unit of this type be placed at this position? Checks all tiles the unit would occupy based on its size.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.IsBoundedAreaBuildable(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Can a unit of this type be placed at this position with a walkable border? Like IsAreaBuildable but also checks one tile of clearance around the unit.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetPathBetween(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Find the shortest path between two grid positions. Returns an empty list if no path exists.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetPathBetween(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Find the shortest path between two grid positions. When avoidUnits is true, cells occupied by mobile units are treated as impassable (uses buildable checks instead of walkable), producing paths that avoid other units. Returns an empty list if no path exists.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetPathToUnit(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Find a path from a position to any walkable tile adjacent to a unit. Returns an empty list if no path exists.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetBuildablePositionsNearUnit(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Get all buildable positions adjacent to a unit.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.FindProspectiveBuildPositions(AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Find all valid build positions on the map for a given unit type. Checks bounded area buildability (clearance around the unit).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IGameState.GetFailedCommands
member.summary: Get commands from the previous tick that passed queue-time validation but failed during Phase 1 processing. Gold for failed Build/Train commands is automatically refunded.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.IPlanningAgent
member.summary: The interface your AI agent must implement. The game engine will call these methods at the appropriate times.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IPlanningAgent.InitializeMatch
member.summary: Called once at the beginning of a match (before any rounds). Use this for one-time setup that persists across rounds.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IPlanningAgent.InitializeRound(AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Called at the beginning of each round. Use this to reset per-round state. The game state is available for initial queries (e.g., finding build positions).
member.param: The initial game state for this round

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IPlanningAgent.Update(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Called every frame during gameplay. This is your main decision-making method - query the game state and issue commands to your units.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.IPlanningAgent.Learn(AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Called at the end of each round before units are destroyed. Use this to observe the win/loss state and learn from it.
member.param: The final game state for this round

member.name: T:AgentSDK.Pathfinder
member.summary:
Shared A* pathfinder for grid-based maps. Used by both the Unity game engine and the AgentTestHarness simulation to ensure identical pathfinding results.
Algorithm: A* with Euclidean heuristic, 8-directional movement. Edge costs: 1.0 for cardinal, sqrt(2) for diagonal. Tie-breaking: lowest f, then highest g (prefer progress), then lowest key (deterministic).

member.name: T:AgentSDK.Pathfinder.CellPassable
member.summary: Callback to check if a cell is passable.
member.returns: True if the cell can be traversed

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Pathfinder.FindPath(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position,System.Int32,System.Int32,AgentSDK.Pathfinder.CellPassable,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Find the shortest path between two positions on a grid.
The start position is allowed to be impassable (unit may be inside a building). The end position must be passable. Returns the path excluding the start position, including the end position. Returns an empty list if no path exists.
member.param: Maximum node expansions before giving up

member.name: T:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase
member.summary:
Optional convenience base class for agents. Provides unit tracking lists and an UpdateGameState() helper so you don't have to query unit lists manually each frame.
To use: extend this class and override Update() and InitializeMatch(). Call UpdateGameState(state) at the start of your Update() method.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyAgentNbr
member.summary: The enemy's agent number

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.mainMineNbr
member.summary: Your primary mine number (-1 if not set)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.mainBaseNbr
member.summary: Your primary base number (-1 if not set)

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.mines
member.summary: All gold mines on the map

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myPawns
member.summary: Your pawns

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myWarriors
member.summary: Your warriors

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myArchers
member.summary: Your archers

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myBases
member.summary: Your bases

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myBarracks
member.summary: Your barracks

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myArchery
member.summary: Your archeries

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myLancers
member.summary: Your lancers

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myTowers
member.summary: Your towers

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myMonasteries
member.summary: Your monasteries

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.myMonks
member.summary: Your monks

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyPawns
member.summary: Enemy pawns

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyWarriors
member.summary: Enemy warriors

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyArchers
member.summary: Enemy archers

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyBases
member.summary: Enemy bases

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyBarracks
member.summary: Enemy barracks

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyArchery
member.summary: Enemy archeries

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyLancers
member.summary: Enemy lancers

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyTowers
member.summary: Enemy towers

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyMonasteries
member.summary: Enemy monasteries

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.enemyMonks
member.summary: Enemy monks

member.name: F:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.buildPositions
member.summary: Pre-computed valid build positions for 3x3 structures

member.name: P:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.DebugText
member.summary: Debug text displayed on the Custom Debug UI overlay. Set this in your Update() method to show agent state info.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.InitializeMatch
member.summary: Called once per match. Override to set up match-level state.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.InitializeRound(AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Called at the start of each round. Initializes all unit tracking lists and finds prospective build positions. If you override this, call base.InitializeRound(state) first.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.Update(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Your main AI logic. Override this to implement your strategy. Call UpdateGameState(state) at the beginning to refresh unit lists.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.Learn(AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Called after each round ends. Override to implement learning. Default implementation does nothing.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.HasBuiltUnit(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Returns true if any unit in the list is fully built. Use this to check dependencies before building/training (e.g., HasBuiltUnit(myBases, state) before building a barracks).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.PlanningAgentBase.UpdateGameState(AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Refreshes all unit tracking lists from the current game state. Call this at the start of your Update() method.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.Position
member.summary: A 2D grid position. Replaces Unity's Vector3Int for agent code.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.Position.X
member.summary: X coordinate on the grid

member.name: P:AgentSDK.Position.Y
member.summary: Y coordinate on the grid

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Position.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new position at (, )

member.name: P:AgentSDK.Position.Zero
member.summary: Position (0, 0)

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Position.Distance(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Euclidean distance between two positions

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Position.Center(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Center cell of a unit's footprint given its top-left corner and size. For 1x1 units returns the same position; for 3x3 returns topLeft+(1,-1).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Position.op_Addition(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Add two positions component-wise

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Position.op_Subtraction(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Subtract two positions component-wise

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Position.op_Equality(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if two positions are equal

member.name: M:AgentSDK.Position.op_Inequality(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if two positions are not equal

member.name: T:AgentSDK.TaskEngine
member.summary:
Shared game-rule logic for unit tasks. Both the Unity engine and SimGame call these methods so task behavior is guaranteed identical.
Methods are pure functions of their inputs — no Unity dependencies.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.DebugLog
member.summary: Optional debug log callback. Set from Unity to route to Debug.Log.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.MoveResult
member.summary: Result of attempting to move a unit one cell along its path.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.MoveResult.Moved
member.summary: Successfully moved to the next cell.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.MoveResult.BlockedByUnit
member.summary: Blocked by a mobile unit (walkable but not buildable).

member.name: F:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.MoveResult.BlockedByTerrain
member.summary: Blocked by terrain/building (not walkable). Needs re-path.

member.name: F:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.MoveResult.InsufficientMovement
member.summary: Not enough accumulated movement to reach next cell.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.TryMoveToCell(AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position,System.Single,AgentSDK.GameGrid,System.Single@)
member.summary: Attempt to move to the next cell in a path. Checks grid state and deducts movement from the accumulator. Does NOT modify position or grid state — the caller is responsible for applying the result.
member.returns: The move result indicating what happened.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.FindDetourAroundBlocker(AgentSDK.Position,System.Collections.Generic.List{AgentSDK.Position},System.Int32,AgentSDK.GameGrid)
member.summary: Scan ahead in a path to find the first buildable/passage cell past the blocker, then re-path from current position to that cell avoiding units. Returns the spliced detour + remainder, or null if no detour found.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.ComputeDamagePerTick(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Compute damage dealt per tick by an attacker to a target.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.IsInAttackRange(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if an attacker is within effective attack range of a target.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.ComputeCenterPosition(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Compute the center position of a unit for range calculations. For 1x1 units, returns the grid position. For multi-cell buildings, returns center of the non-walkable footprint (excluding the top passage row).

member.name: F:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.TimerEpsilon
member.summary: Small epsilon for timer comparisons. Floating-point accumulation error (e.g. 0.2f - 4×0.05f leaves ~8e-9 residual) can prevent timers from reaching exactly zero. 1e-4 is safely above worst-case drift (~1e-6) but well below the smallest tick duration (0.05).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.AdvanceTrainTimer(System.Single@,System.Single)
member.summary: Advance training timer. Returns true when training is complete.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.AdvanceBuildTimer(System.Single@,System.Single)
member.summary: Advance build timer. Returns true when construction is complete.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.ComputeMiningTime(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Compute mining time for a full mining capacity trip.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.ComputeGoldMined(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Compute gold mined from a mine, capped at mine health and mining capacity.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.CanHeal(System.Single,System.Single,AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Check if a heal action can be performed. Returns true if the monk has enough mana and the target is missing at least HEAL_AMOUNT HP.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.ComputeHealAmount(AgentSDK.UnitType)
member.summary: Compute the heal amount for a target unit type. Returns the flat HEAL_AMOUNT, capped at missing HP.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.IsInHealRange(AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.Position)
member.summary: Check if a healer is within heal range of a target.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.ComputeRepairPerTick(AgentSDK.UnitType,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Compute repair amount per tick. Repair rate is 110% of build rate.

member.name: M:AgentSDK.TaskEngine.RegenMana(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Regenerate mana for a unit per tick.

member.name: T:AgentSDK.UnitAction
member.summary: Actions a unit can be performing

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.IDLE
member.summary: Unit has nothing to do

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.MOVE
member.summary: Moving to a point

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.TRAIN
member.summary: Training a new unit

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.BUILD
member.summary: Building a structure

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.GATHER
member.summary: Gathering resources

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.ATTACK
member.summary: Attacking a target

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.REPAIR
member.summary: Repairing a damaged building

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitAction.HEAL
member.summary: Healing an allied unit

member.name: T:AgentSDK.UnitInfo
member.summary: Read-only snapshot of a unit's current state. You cannot modify game state through this struct.

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.UnitNbr
member.summary: Unique identifier for this unit

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.UnitType
member.summary: Type of this unit

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.GridPosition
member.summary: Current grid position

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.Health
member.summary: Current health (for mines, this is remaining gold)

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.IsBuilt
member.summary: Whether this unit has finished being built/trained

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CurrentAction
member.summary: What the unit is currently doing

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CanMove
member.summary: Whether this unit type can move

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CanBuild
member.summary: Whether this unit type can build structures

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CanTrain
member.summary: Whether this unit type can train units

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CanAttack
member.summary: Whether this unit type can attack

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CanGather
member.summary: Whether this unit type can gather resources

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CanHeal
member.summary: Whether this unit type can heal allied units

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.Mana
member.summary: Current mana (0 for units without mana)

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.OwnerAgentNbr
member.summary: Agent number of the unit's owner

member.name: P:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.CenterPosition
member.summary: Center cell of this unit's footprint. Use this for distance calculations instead of GridPosition, which is the top-left corner. For 1x1 units (warriors, archers, pawns) this equals GridPosition. For 3x3 structures (bases, barracks, mines, refineries) this is GridPosition+(1,-1).

member.name: M:AgentSDK.UnitInfo.#ctor(System.Int32,AgentSDK.UnitType,AgentSDK.Position,System.Single,System.Boolean,AgentSDK.UnitAction,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Single,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new UnitInfo snapshot

member.name: T:AgentSDK.UnitType
member.summary: All unit types in the game

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.MINE
member.summary: Gold mine resource

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.PAWN
member.summary: Pawn unit - gathers resources and builds structures

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.WARRIOR
member.summary: Melee combat unit

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.ARCHER
member.summary: Ranged combat unit

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.BASE
member.summary: Main base structure - trains pawns

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.BARRACKS
member.summary: Military structure - trains warriors

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.ARCHERY
member.summary: Ranged military structure - trains archers

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.LANCER
member.summary: Lance cavalry unit - extended melee range, strong vs warriors

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.TOWER
member.summary: Defensive tower structure - unlocks lancer training

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.MONASTERY
member.summary: Religious structure - trains monks

member.name: F:AgentSDK.UnitType.MONK
member.summary: Support healer unit - heals allied units, cannot attack
